hero.title: Your Love Story Deserves a Perfect Beginning
hero.subtitle: Bilingual wedding ceremonies crafted with love, elegance, and intention — right in the heart of Miami, FL.

about.title: Ceremonies Crafted with Heart & Soul
about.body1: I'm Juan Carlos, a licensed bilingual wedding officiant serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. With over 8 years of experience uniting couples from all walks of life, I specialize in crafting personalized, heartfelt ceremonies that truly reflect your love story.
about.body2: Whether you envision a romantic beach ceremony at sunrise, an intimate courthouse exchange, or an elegant reception celebration — I will be there to guide every word, every vow, every unforgettable moment.

packages.title: Choose Your Perfect Package
packages.subtitle: Every ceremony is tailored to your vision. All packages include personalized vows and a rehearsal consultation.

items.text: Juan Carlos made our beach ceremony feel like a fairy tale. Every word felt written just for us. We cried. Our guests cried. It was perfect.
items.author: Sofia & Miguel Restrepo

items.text: Bilingual ceremony for our family — half Spanish speakers, half English. He handled it flawlessly, with grace and warmth. Truly professional.
items.author: Amanda & Carlos Vega

items.text: We booked him just two weeks before our elopement. Calm, organized, and everything was seamless. The ceremony was intimate and emotional.
items.author: Laura & David Kim

contact.title: Let's Make Your Dream Come True
contact.subtitle: Ready to start planning your perfect ceremony? Reach out to check availability and begin crafting your story.

form.success: Request Sent! We'll contact you soon.

footer.tagline: Bilingual wedding ceremonies crafted with love in the heart of Miami, FL. Serving couples across South Florida since 2016.
footer.rights: All rights reserved. Licensed in the State of Florida.
